title: Medieval MC [FABRIC] - MMC2
description: Version 1.20 | Medieval Fantasy RPG Adventure & Exploration Modpack everyone wants!
body:

![This is an image](https://i.imgur.com/wj8V3Rl.jpeg)

⚔️ Fully Optimized with Shader Support

⚔️ Bosses of Mass Destruction, Adventurez & Marium's Soulslike Weaponry bringing New Bosses

⚔️ NEW Combat System

⚔️ Origins & Waystones!

⚔️ Thirst and Temperature System

⚔️ Tons of NEW Dungeons & Structures

⚔️ Mythical Metals

⚔️ Journey Map

⚔️ Tons of QOL Features

⚔️ 350 Mods
